home.heroTitle: Your Partner for Import Through Egypt's Ports
home.heroSubtitle: We manage importing goods and containers from abroad, customs clearance, and delivery to your warehouse or door — via Alexandria, Port Said, and Sokhna ports.

home.processStep2Desc: Fast, accurate customs procedures and permits.
home.processStep3Desc: Sea or land freight to the final destination.

home.ctaSubtitle: Contact us today — free quote for containers, freight, and customs clearance.
home.landingOpsBadge: One control room for every shipment
home.landingOpsTitle: From customs documents to cargo arrival
home.landingOpsSubtitle: One clear page for importers: sea freight, containers, customs clearance, land transport, and continuous follow-up from supplier to delivery in Egypt.

home.landingWarehousingDesc: Temporary storage, sorting, and shipment preparation before final delivery.
home.landingOpsPoint2: Documents and customs under one workflow
home.landingOpsPoint4: Delivery from port to warehouse or client door
home.landingNetworkTitle: Egypt's ports as your import gateway
home.landingNetworkSubtitle: We import via Alexandria, Port Said, Sokhna, and Damietta from Europe, Asia, and the Gulf — on reliable shipping lines.
home.fallbackService1Desc: Global trade solutions connecting suppliers and markets across borders.

about.title: About Green Light
about.subtitle: A simple partnership company founded in 1996
about.missionText: Green Light is a simple partnership company founded in 1996. From the outset, the company has ensured it has the competencies to manage and execute work across all fields with precision and full adherence to quality standards.
about.visionText: This has had a profound impact on building the company's client base since its founding, through mutual trust and successful business experiences.

services.subtitle: International trade, logistics, raw materials import, and detergent factory construction.

industries.fallback2Desc: Steel, cement, tiles, and construction supplies for projects across Egypt.
industries.fallback3Desc: Machinery, raw materials, and industrial equipment for factories and plants.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about Green Light
faqs.item1Question: What services does Green Light provide?
faqs.item1Answer: We offer international trade, logistics services, factory raw materials import, and planning, design, and construction of detergent factories — plus shipping, customs clearance, and shipment tracking.
faqs.item2Question: How long has Green Light been in business?
faqs.item2Answer: Green Light is a simple partnership company founded in 1996, with extensive experience executing work with precision and full adherence to quality standards.
faqs.item3Question: How do I request a quote?
faqs.item3Answer: Fill out the quote request form on our website, contact us on WhatsApp at 00201002974960, or email info@greenlight-eg.com.
faqs.item4Question: Do you handle customs clearance and shipping?
faqs.item4Answer: Yes. We provide integrated logistics including sea and land freight, customs clearance, warehousing, and delivery to your warehouse or doorstep via Egypt's ports.
faqs.item5Question: Do you import raw materials for factories?
faqs.item5Answer: Yes. We specialize in importing production inputs and industrial raw materials for factories from trusted global suppliers, with full shipment tracking until delivery.
faqs.item6Answer: Yes. We offer planning, engineering design, and turnkey construction of detergent plants — from feasibility studies through execution and commissioning.
faqs.item7Answer: Our office is in Egypt – New Damietta, Al Hawey 1, Magowerya. Call us at 00201203004406 or 00201002974960.

quote.title: Request a Shipping Quote
